title: Earnings Preview Aehr Test Systems Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Prior to Aehr Test Systems Q3 2024 earnings report, analyst expectations called for a quarterly loss of $0.04 per share with revenues expected to be $14.7 million, down 14.6% year-over-year. The company faced headwinds from overall softness in semiconductor capital expenditure and delayed customer orders. The actual results proved worse than initial expectations, with revenue of $7.6 million coming in significantly below the $14.7 million forecast. This represented a 56% decline from Q3 2023. The company reported record bookings of $24.5 million providing some offset to near-term revenue weakness. Total backlog stood at $20 million expected to generate revenue in Q4 2024.
